chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الدُّعَاءِ إِذَا خَرَجَ الْإِنْسَانُ مِنْ مَنْزِلِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 50 – The Supplication when the person exits from his house

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور صحيح عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/326)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور صحيح عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/326)
text: كَانَ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا خَرَجَ مِنْ مَنْزِلِهِ قَالَ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ خَرَجْتُ بِحَوْلِ اللَّهِ وَ قُوَّتِهِ لَا بِحَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَ لَا قُوَّتِي بَلْ بِحَوْلِكَ وَ قُوَّتِكَ يَا رَبِّ مُتَعَرِّضاً لِرِزْقِكَ فَأْتِنِي بِهِ فِي عَافِيَةٍ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It was so that whenever my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> went out from his<sup>asws</sup> house, said: ‘In the Name of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Beneficent, the Merciful. I<sup>asws</sup> go out with the Might of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and His<sup>azwj</sup> Strength, not by my<sup>asws</sup> might and my<sup>asws</sup> strength, but with Your<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Your<sup>azwj</sup> Strength. O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! I<sup>asws</sup> am exposing myself<sup>asws</sup> to Your<sup>azwj</sup> sustenance, therefore Give it to me in good health’’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Sinan from al-Rida (a.s.) who has said the following: “My father when coming out of his house would say, ‘(I begin) in the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful. I have come out by means and power of Allah and not by my own means and power, but, O Lord, by Your power and means, in search for sustenance from You, so grant me sustenance in good health.’”
